findings.description: Source lists five column widgets (column_label, column_code, column_link, column_checkbox, column_radio), but hints only include `column:checkbox` and `column:link`. Missing: `column:label`, `column:code`, `column:radio`.
Attribute `estimatedMaxSearchResults` from the attributes table is not present in hints. This is a long, distinctive property name useful for lookup.
findings.source_evidence: estimatedMaxSearchResults | 検索結果として想定される最大件数 | 文字列 | × | × | 設計書の表示時に...
